prompt: Design a logo for an adventure travel company named 'Adventure,' incorporating a mountain peak motif inspired by the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a minimalist logo for an adventure travel company. The logo must prominently feature the company name 'Adventure' as text. Directly above the text, integrate a stylized mountain range motif, mimicking the distinct black and white silhouette style of the peaks shown in image 1. The overall design should be clean, iconic, and suitable for a brand mark, with a vector-graphic aesthetic.
objects: Stylized mountain range silhouette (black and white)
Mountain range positioned directly above the text
